description: Scapy is a powerful Python-based interactive packet manipulation program and library. It can forge or decode packets of a wide number of protocols, send them on the wire, capture them, match requests and replies, and much more.

documentation.example: from scapy.all import ARP, Ether, srp; ans, _ = srp(Ether(dst='ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff')/ARP(pdst='10.0.0.0/24'), timeout=2)
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/scapy && python3 scapy.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/scapy && python3 scapy.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/scapy && python3 scapy.py --help`. Interactive packet manipulation program + library.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the network category. Fits when the engagement needs: Interactive packet manipulation program + library.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Interactive packet manipulation program + library.
